title: Effects of Transcutaneous Vagus Nerve Stimulation in Heart Failure Patients
author: Maestri, Roberto
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.title: Data pertaining to single-blind, randomised, cross-over studies:
steps.instruction: Data pertaining to single-blind, randomised, cross-over studies:

steps.title: TVNS_AIM_1_Trial_1 to compare the acute effect...
steps.instruction: TVNS_AIM_1_Trial_1 to compare the acute effect of left tVNS at 25 Hz and 10 Hz,

steps.title: TVNS_AIM_1_Trial_2 to compare the acute effect...
steps.instruction: TVNS_AIM_1_Trial_2 to compare the acute effect of left and right tVNS at the best frequency identified in study 1,

steps.title: TVNS_AIM_1_Trial_3_HS to compare the acute effect...
steps.instruction: TVNS_AIM_1_Trial_3_HS to compare the acute effect of the identified optimal stimulation protocol with sham stimulation in Healthy subjects and

steps.title: TVNS_AIM_1_Trial_3_HF to compare the acute effect...
steps.instruction: TVNS_AIM_1_Trial_3_HF to compare the acute effect of the identified optimal stimulation protocol with sham stimulation in Heart failure patients
